name: Washmen Ops Workspace
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq openvpn && bash .devcontainer/setup-vpn-config.sh; bash .devcontainer/setup.sh

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Agent SDK

WASHMEN_GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub PAT with repo scope for cloning and pushing

GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY.description: Google Maps API key for REACT_APP_GOOGLE_SERVICES_MAPS_KEY

E2E_CLIENT_ID.description: Cognito E2E client ID for dev iframe machine auth

E2E_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Cognito E2E client secret for dev iframe machine auth

VPN_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private key for AWS Client VPN (PEM format, base64-encoded)
